slides.headline:
Meet customers where they are.
Move them where they need to go.
slides.subhead: A walk through the Found journey — Capture, Diagnose, Enhance, Reinvent — and what we build at each phase.

slides.headline: The phases — the journey, mapped.
slides.subhead: One substrate, four positions. Not every customer starts at phase one — we meet you where you are.

rows.label: Value to them
rows.value: The workflow changes for the better

slides.footnote: The human stays in the lead until the engine has earned the right to run without them.

slides.headline: Capture
slides.body: Your team works as normal. We record what happens, redact what's sensitive, and build the decision graph that becomes your engine.

slides.headline: How we build the graph — locally, nothing sensitive leaves.
slides.callout: L1 · L2 active — ingest → graph · everything stays local through redaction

slides.headline: Workflow capture in action.
slides.caption: The capture pipeline records, redacts PHI locally, digests via Whisper, and writes back to the decision graph — all without sensitive data leaving the environment.
slides.video_label: Capture pipeline demo — workflow recording → graph

slides.headline: Tribal knowledge becomes a queryable engine.
slides.body: Every workflow your team runs — pricing a case, reviewing a contract, routing a request — becomes a node in your intelligence graph. The wedge finds the pain. The graph compounds it.
bullets: Works on day one with no process change required
PHI redaction happens locally — nothing sensitive leaves your environment
Each capture deepens L2: ontology, entity resolution, bi-temporal trace
The graph you build in Capture funds everything in Diagnose

slides.headline: Diagnose
slides.body: You may already have workflows captured — or we connect directly to your data warehouse. Either way, we backtest and show you what you missed.

slides.headline: One pull. Priced vs what you missed.
slides.callout: L2 · L3 active — the backtest engine runs your history against the intelligence graph

slides.headline: The backtest: what you missed, priced.
slides.caption: Connect your data warehouse, seed the engine, and generate a worklist of missed revenue and savings opportunities — quantified against your actual history.
slides.video_label: Diagnose demo — data connect → backtest → priced worklist

slides.headline: Enhance
slides.body: The analyst surfaces artifacts. Your team judges them — confirm, reject, edit. Every judgment makes the next one sharper. The loop runs continuously.

slides.headline: The value loop — every judgment compounds.
slides.callout: Engine compounds · regenerates and re-ranks the analyst's worklist · every judgment makes the next one sharper

slides.headline: The analyst worklist — work-finding value loop.
slides.caption: The harnessed analyst surfaces prioritized artifacts. Each confirm or reject writes provenance back to the graph. The worklist re-ranks in real time. The human stays in the lead.
slides.video_label: Enhance demo — analyst worklist → artifact → judgment → graph

slides.eyebrow: Five Principles · How the platform is built
slides.headline: What we take in, run through, and ship.

items.name: Value loops
items.body: The atomic unit of work. An event fires an analyst, it generates an artifact, a human confirms or rejects, the judgment writes back as provenance, the artifact regenerates. The surface is swappable — the loop is the product.

items.name: Agentic distillation
items.body: Use AI to extract structure and determinism out of raw, unstructured signal — shrink-distill the context down to what's load-bearing, then bind it to the graph.

items.name: Harnessing context
items.body: Don't stuff a prompt — compose the right context from the graph for each inference, scoped and provenance-bound. The graph is the memory; the composer decides what reaches the model and why.

items.name: Control & tool routing
items.body: Capability-token RBAC gates what any agent can touch at the field level; routing decides which model and which tool, predictably. This is the harness that earns autonomy.

items.name: Agentic patterns
items.body: The orchestration shapes we lead on: human-in-the-lead, harnessed-not-autonomous, and — the frontier we own — collaborative loops where conflicting human feedback raises a merge conflict and the agent calls the meeting.

slides.headline: Where do you sit on the journey?
slides.subhead: We meet you at your current phase and move you forward. Capture builds the graph. Diagnose prices the gap. Enhance closes it — continuously.
